ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor device that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "resistance" REAL /* Resistance reading from the sensor */,
  "ppm" REAL /* Parts per million (PPM) reading from the sensor */,
  "oven_temperature" REAL /* Oven temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flags for data validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of data creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_devices ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_devices" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor device */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor device */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of device creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of device update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Resistance, PPM, Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of type creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of type update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flags for data validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of reading creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of reading update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor device the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_devices ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor device the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_devices ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of access creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of access update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor device maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of maintenance creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of maintenance update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_devices ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., calibration, firmware) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of technician creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of technician update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotated_data" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Textual annotation for the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of annotation creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of annotation update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotated_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was performed */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the integrated data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of integration creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of integration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of version creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
